bugs.error_message: Room card shows 'Ready for Inspection' button on IN_PROGRESS card — looks like a second status label
bugs.root_cause: Button label 'Ready for Inspection' reads as a status, not an action
bugs.fix: Renamed button to 'Done Cleaning' to clarify it's an action

bugs.error_message: Status history showing every action twice
bugs.root_cause: DB trigger handle_room_status_history fires on every room_status UPDATE, but API code also manually inserted to room_status_history — double write on every action
bugs.fix: Removed manual room_status_history inserts from rooms.py and housekeeping.py submit_inspection. DB trigger alone handles history.

bugs.error_message: Status history shows all-time entries, not just today
bugs.root_cause: get_room_history had no date filter — returned up to 50 all-time entries
bugs.fix: Added .gte('created_at', today_start) filter with UTC offset

bugs.error_message: Inspections tab shows UUID as inspector name instead of actual name
bugs.root_cause: list_inspections returned raw inspected_by UUID. FK points to auth.users not user_profiles so join syntax won't work.
bugs.fix: After fetching rows, collect unique inspector UUIDs, batch-query user_profiles, build name_map. Also added +00:00 UTC offset to date filter.

bugs.error_message: Housekeeper can add tasks but cannot see them
bugs.root_cause: list_tasks filtered assigned_to=user_id for housekeepers. Tasks they created without self-assigning were invisible.
bugs.fix: Changed to OR condition: assigned_to=uid OR created_by=uid using supabase .or_() filter

bugs.fix: Added null safety (optional chaining or null check)

bugs.error_message: React hydration errors #418/#423/#425 on every dashboard page load (10 errors)
bugs.root_cause: new Date().getHours() called during SSR for time-based greeting produces different result on server (UTC) vs client (local time), text content mismatch. GM dashboard hardcodes Good morning with no time check.
bugs.fix: Wrap greeting in useEffect+useState to defer to client-only render, or add suppressHydrationWarning on greeting element.

bugs.error_message: Room Board defaults to tomorrow for US hotels after ~7 PM local time
bugs.root_cause: todayISO() uses new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0] which is UTC. For Texas hotel CDT=UTC-5, after 7pm local toISOString returns next calendar day.
bugs.fix: Replace todayISO() with format(new Date(), "yyyy-MM-dd") from date-fns which uses local timezone.

bugs.error_message: AI Copilot floating panel returns Something went wrong for every query
bugs.root_cause: aiApi.chat() throws on every call in production. Likely missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY on Railway or broken /v1/ai/chat route. Catch block swallows actual error.
bugs.fix: Check Railway env vars for ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Log actual error from catch before showing generic message.

bugs.error_message: AI Auto-Assign shows misleading AI suggestions applied toast but assignments table stays empty
bugs.root_cause: API call completes but assignments query does not refresh or date format mismatch means saved data is not returned. False confirmation is worse than prior silent failure.
bugs.fix: Invalidate assignments query after AI auto-assign AND verify API persists to correct date format.

bugs.error_message: Raw DB enum labels shown in stat cards on Reports, Guest Requests, Lost & Found pages
bugs.root_cause: Status keys from API response are PostgreSQL enum values (IN_PROGRESS, INSPECTED, UNCLAIMED) rendered directly without formatting.
bugs.fix: Apply status.replace(/_/g, " ").replace(/ w/g, c => c.toUpperCase()) or build a STATUS_LABELS lookup map.

bugs.root_cause: Was returning: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]

bugs.error_message: Wrong reference: setActiveTab should be handleTabChange
bugs.root_cause: Used "setActiveTab" instead of "handleTabChange"

bugs.error_message: Room Board shows tomorrow's date after ~7 PM local time for Texas hotels
bugs.root_cause: todayISO() used toISOString().split('T')[0] which returns UTC date, not local date. UTC-5/6 offset means next-day UTC after 7 PM local.
bugs.fix: Replaced with format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd') from date-fns which uses local timezone

bugs.error_message: React hydration errors #418/#423/#425 on every dashboard page load
bugs.root_cause: getGreeting() and hardcoded 'Good morning' called new Date().getHours() during render — server (UTC) and client (CDT) produce different hour values, causing text mismatch
bugs.fix:
Removed getGreeting() functions; added useState('Good morning') + useEffect to set greeting client-only. Added suppressHydrationWarning on date

elements.

bugs.error_message: Wrong reference: todayISO should be sevenDaysAgoISO
bugs.root_cause: Used "todayISO" instead of "sevenDaysAgoISO"

bugs.error_message: Status history stuck in constant loading / no data displayed
bugs.root_cause: Migration 024 dropped the handle_room_status_history DB trigger but rooms.py PATCH /rooms/{id}/status still relied on it (via stale comment). No history entries were ever written. Also, `date` was not imported in rooms.py, causing NameError on get_room_history endpoint, which made React Query retry 3x and appear stuck loading.
bugs.fix: 1) Added `date` to `from datetime import` in rooms.py. 2) Added explicit room_status_history insert after status update. 3) Removed today-only filter from get_room_history (was filtering out all past entries).

bugs.error_message: My Rooms to-do count always 0 for 'Completed'; 'Rooms Today' shows remaining count not total
bugs.root_cause: Backend /my-rooms filtered to DIRTY/IN_PROGRESS/PICKUP only, so INSPECTED rooms never returned. Dashboard done=INSPECTED count was always 0. rooms.length equaled remaining (not total assigned).
bugs.fix: Rewrote my-rooms to query room_assignments for today's date then fetch all statuses for those rooms (no status filter). Frontend derived counts already correct once all rooms returned.

bugs.error_message: Housekeeper dashboard not updating (stale data from previous user session)
bugs.root_cause: Query key ['my-rooms'] had no user ID, so React Query could serve cached data from a previous housekeeper who used the same browser. Also query wasn't guarded by enabled: !!user?.id.
bugs.fix: Changed query key to ['my-rooms', user?.id] and added enabled: !!user?.id.

bugs.error_message: Inspection history not showing past inspections
bugs.root_cause: Default dateFrom was today only. Past inspections exist in DB but weren't visible without manually changing the date range. Also inspection status change to INSPECTED was never written to room_status_history (trigger dropped, no explicit write).
bugs.fix: 1) Changed default dateFrom to sevenDaysAgoISO() so last 7 days show by default. 2) Added explicit room_status_history insert in submit_inspection endpoint.

bugs.error_message: Hotel profile shows required field errors on every field when saving
bugs.root_cause: useEffect calling reset(fullHotel) had no guard against subsequent runs. React Query background refetches updated fullHotel, re-triggering reset() which wiped user's in-progress edits. Next submit found empty strings and validation failed on all fields.
bugs.fix: Added hydratedRef = useRef(false). The reset() now only runs once (first load). Background refetches no longer overwrite user input.

bugs.error_message: SLA Compliance card text clipped on mobile — TrendChartsRow stats overflow narrow column
bugs.root_cause: Outer grid used `grid grid-cols-2 gap-4` with no responsive breakpoint, forcing both chart cards into half-width on mobile and clipping the SLA stat boxes
bugs.fix: Changed to `grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2` so each card gets full width on mobile

bugs.error_message: FailurePredictionSidebar overlapping work orders content on mobile
bugs.root_cause: FailurePredictionSidebar was not imported anywhere — the component (w-72 shrink-0) had previously been placed in a flex-row layout that stacked and overlapped content on mobile screens
bugs.fix: Re-integrated FailurePredictionSidebar with responsive layout: flex-col on mobile (stacks below), lg:flex-row on desktop (true sidebar). Inner content wrapped in flex-1 min-w-0.

bugs.error_message: Completed/cancelled tasks show Edit button in TaskDetailDrawer header
bugs.root_cause: TaskDetailDrawer rendered the Pencil edit button unconditionally in the drawer header — bypassed the KebabMenu status guard that was fixed in the previous commit
bugs.fix: Wrapped pencil button in `task.status !== 'completed' && task.status !== 'cancelled'` guard

bugs.error_message: React Hook 'useState' is called conditionally. React Hooks must be called in the exact same order in every component render.
bugs.root_cause: Early return `if (!isGM) return (...)` at line 677 placed before all hook declarations (lines 689-752), violating React Rules of Hooks.
bugs.fix: Moved all useState, useMemo, useQuery, useMutation hooks above the early return. Added `enabled: isGM` to both useQuery calls to avoid API calls for non-GM users.
